channel.title: Reading - Tag - 滑翔闪'S BLOG

item.title: HOW TO SLAY A DRAGON
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: #　HOW TO SLAY A DRAGON: A Fantasy Hero’s Guide to the Real Middle Ages In the medieval era, where swords and sorcery once reigned supreme, tales of dragons and warriors have captured the imagination. People yearn for the medieval times much like they long for the idyllic countryside—a utopia that exists solely in the realm of imagination. Strangely enough, there are those who find solace in pursuing a different path, even if it leads them astray—people like myself, who revel in the unconventional.

item.title: The Calling of Spirits
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: “The Calling of Spirits”:Prosperity’s zenith, sorcery’s sway, Where power’s mirage, in twilight, may play. During the boring time of the Chinese New Year holidays, I finally finished reading “The Calling of Spirits .” In 1768, a panic of sorcery called “The Calling of Spirits” swept across the land of the Qing Empire. Surprisingly, the terms “prosperous era” and “sorcery” became parallel concepts. Kong Feili followed the thread of the “sorcery/hair-cutting
